{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Pawn
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Pawns]] are creatures that can crawl on ceilings and fire plasma bolts.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c17">''The Captain'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
